consistency.type_consistency: Wondrous item matches general item type expectation.
consistency.rarity_consistency: Legendary is consistent with high-power effects.

quality.description_clarity: The description clearly defines two distinct mechanical benefits related to the Sphere of Annihilation.
quality.readability: Good, using standard D&D formatting (e.g., ability checks, actions).

mechanics.primary_benefit: Doubles proficiency bonus for Intelligence (Arcana) checks made to control a Sphere of Annihilation.

secondary_benefit.trigger: Starting turn with control over a Sphere of Annihilation.
secondary_benefit.effect: Levitate the Sphere 10 feet + (10 * Intelligence modifier) feet.

mechanics.interaction_check: Mechanics strongly imply this item is designed specifically to counter or augment the difficulty of controlling the Sphere of Annihilation, which is appropriate for a Legendary item.
